name: memory-claw
description: 100% autonomous multilingual OpenClaw plugin for memory capture and recall via LanceDB + Mistral Embeddings. v2.4.32: CRITICAL FIX - Disabled minCaptureImportance (set to 0.0), disabled duplicate detection (set to 1.0), disabled rate limiter. This allows ALL messages to be captured for diagnosis. Gradually re-enable filters once captures are confirmed working.
author: duan78
